offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month, manual compilation causes late submissions. We automate the reporting process instead of manual compilation and submission of reports.
problem: Difficulty in compiling and submitting accurate compliance reports on time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing compliance tools
try_it: Let users try data extraction and formatting for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
